headline: Is Archer-Daniels-Midland (ADM) Attractive After Its 66% One-Year Share Price Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether Archer-Daniels-Midland stock offers solid value at its current price, it helps to break the story into recent returns, current expectations, and what the numbers actually say about valuation. The stock most recently closed at US$77.12, after a week where it declined 5.3%, a month where it gained 10.4%, and year to date it is up 30.6%, with a 65.9% return over the last year. Recent price moves sit against a backdrop of ongoing attention on Archer-Daniels-Midland's...
